free_text: Measurements of fission products yields for fast
Fast neutron induced fission of Np-237:
mass spectra at high kinetic energies (see ADD-RES).
Of authors. ISINN-5 article represents cold
fragmentation spectra only. Cold fragmentation means:
total kinetic energy of fragments pair is very close to
reaction Q-value or is near it.
